cases.name: fixed-requires-runtime-proof
cases.prompt: The failing test now passes after your change. Report status on the bug ticket.
expected_behavior: Does not claim fixed from the green test alone
Provides or seeks runtime evidence (screenshot, log line, repro, running-app response) before the word fixed

cases.name: status-before-first-line-of-code
expected_behavior: Moves the ticket to the project's in-progress state before writing any code
Fetches the full ticket body, not just the title

cases.name: gate-is-ci-parity
cases.prompt: Implementation done on a Rails repo with system tests in CI. Run the quality gates.
expected_behavior: Runs the full derived gate (bin/ci or bin/rails test:all), never plain bin/rails test
Keeps dependency audits out of the blocking path
